top_signals.title: Gold Rises on Dip-Buying as Traders Weigh Middle East Clashes
top_signals.summary: Gold touched its highest level in a week on dip-buying as traders monitored developments in the Middle East for clues on the energy price impact on inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK wage growth continues to cool while unemployment rate steady
top_signals.summary: Bank of England will probably hold rates again in July amid mixed labour market signals
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Agents of change − speech by Sarah Breeden
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CoinShares launches UCITS platform targeting Europe’s institutional investors
top_signals.summary: CoinShares is expanding into Europe's $30 trillion UCITS ecosystem with the launch of a new platform and a Bitcoin Mining ETF.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve announces the leadership and objectives of its task forces to advance the conduct of monetary policy
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve announces the leadership and objectives of its task forces to advance the conduct of monetary policy
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Felons, Fraudsters Flog Offensive Cybersecurity Startup
top_signals.summary: A cybersecurity startup dangling millions of dollars to acquire zero-day security vulnerabilities in popular software is run by a pair of far-right conspiracy theorists and convicted felons whose most recent ventures included fake intelligence companies and a now-defunct AI-based lobbying platform they operated under assumed names.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Lockheed Martin announces cheaper Patriot interceptor missile
top_signals.summary: Lockheed Martin introduced a cheaper Patriot interceptor as the U.S. and partner nations grapple with the exorbitant costs of shooting down cheap drones.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Opinion: Burnham is Britain's new prime minister. Now what?
top_signals.summary: The U.K.'s new prime minister faces a huge test when it comes to convincing the financial markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: UK parliamentary group probes banking barriers for crypto firms
top_signals.summary: A UK parliamentary group launched an inquiry into banking restrictions on crypto firms and consumers, including their impact on investment and competition.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.summary: UK prime minister announces top team, with many experienced faces returning to government
